ast.name: title
ast.source: If you like this plugin, and would like to help support continued development, use this button!
ast.target: 如果你喜欢这个插件，并希望帮助支持持续开发，请使用此按钮！

ast.name: title
ast.source: Click to open this settings page

ast.target: 从远程CSS插入规则时出错

ast.target: 无法调度选项卡选择：无效的组名。

ast.source: CodeBlockRenderer.renderExternal called on an invalid element.
ast.target: CodeBlockRenderer.renderExternal 在无效元素上被调用。

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在加载 CodeBlock Customizer 插件

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在卸载 CodeBlock Customizer 插件

ast.name: log
ast.source: Codeblock Customizer: Migrating settings to new structure.
ast.target: Codeblock Customizer: 正在将设置迁移到新结构。

ast.name: log
ast.target: Codeblock Customizer: 设置迁移成功。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default the plugin is disabled in source mode. You can enable it in source mode as well using this toggle.
ast.target: 默认情况下，该插件在源代码模式下是禁用的。您也可以使用此开关在源代码模式下启用它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define languages, separated by a comma, to which the plugin should not apply. You can use a wildcard (*) either at the beginning, or at the end. For example: ad-* will exclude codeblocks where the language starts with ad- e.g.: ad-info, ad-error etc.
ast.target: 定义插件不应应用的语言，用逗号分隔。您可以在开头或结尾使用通配符（*）。例如：ad-* 将排除语言以 ad- 开头的代码块，例如：ad-info、ad-error 等。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Restore all default themes to their original settings.
ast.target: 将所有默认主题恢复为其原始设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the styling is applied to documents when printed to PDF. By default PDF printing uses light theme colors.
ast.target: 如果启用，打印为PDF时，样式将应用于文档。默认情况下，PDF打印使用浅色主题颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, PDF printing will use the dark theme colors when a dark theme is selected, and light theme colors when a light theme is selected.
ast.target: 如果启用，当选择深色主题时，PDF打印将使用深色主题颜色；当选择浅色主题时，则使用浅色主题颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the plugin will try to prevent code blocks from being split across multiple pages when printing.
ast.target: 如果启用，插件将尝试防止代码块在打印时跨页拆分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, all collapsed code blocks specified by the "fold" parameter will be expanded when printing. This results in the printed document containing expanded code blocks where "fold" was used.
ast.target: 如果启用，所有由“fold”参数指定的折叠代码块将在打印时展开。这会导致打印文档中包含使用“fold”的展开代码块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, annotations will be printed as visible code comments instead of rendered icons.
ast.target: 如果启用，注释将打印为可见的代码注释，而不是渲染的图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select a syntax theme to apply to all code blocks.
ast.target: 选择一个语法主题以应用于所有代码块。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a new syntax theme. The currently viewed syntax theme's colors will be copied as a starting point.
ast.target: 创建一个新的语法主题。当前查看的语法主题的颜色将复制为起点。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enter a language name to assign a specific syntax theme.
ast.target: 输入语言名称以分配特定的语法主题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, you can set the color for the active line (including codeblocks).
ast.target: 如果启用，您可以设置活动行（包括代码块）的颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, editor mode will use PrismJS for syntax highlighting instead of CodeMirror's built-in highlighting. This makes editor mode syntax highlighting match reading mode syntax highlighting.
ast.target: 如果启用，编辑器模式将使用PrismJS进行语法高亮，而不是CodeMirror的内置高亮。这会使编辑器模式的语法高亮与阅读模式的语法高亮相匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, indentation lines will be shown in reading view.
ast.target: 如果启用，缩进线将在阅读视图中显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the code will be unwrapped in reading view.
ast.target: 如果启用，代码将在阅读视图中取消换行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the style of the separator line shown when line number jumps are used.
ast.target: 选择当使用行号跳转时显示的分隔线样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the style of the separator line shown when code lines are hidden.
ast.target: 选择当代码行被隐藏时显示的分隔线样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, highlighted lines will also highlight the gutter (line number), not just the line.
ast.target: 如果启用，高亮行也将高亮装订线（行号），而不仅仅是行本身。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the active line number will be highlighted with a separate color.
ast.target: 如果启用，活动行号将使用单独的颜色进行高亮。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the header text will be set to bold.
ast.target: 如果启用，标题文本将设置为粗体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the header text will be set to italic.
ast.target: 如果启用，标题文本将设置为斜体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, code blocks without `fold` or `unfold` specified will not collapse when clicking the header.
ast.target: 如果启用，未指定 `fold` 或 `unfold` 的代码块在点击标题时将不会折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled a collapse icon will be displayed in the header. Select the position of the collapse icon.
ast.target: 如果启用，标题中将显示一个折叠图标。选择折叠图标的位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the style of the collapse icon.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Overwrite the default "Collapsed Code" text in the header, when the file parameter is not defined.
ast.target: 当未定义文件参数时，覆盖标题中的默认“折叠代码”文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the codeblock language will be displayed in the header.
ast.target: 如果启用，代码块语言将显示在标题中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the codeblock language text will be set to bold.
ast.target: 如果启用，代码块语言文本将设置为粗体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the codeblock language text will be set to italic.
ast.target: 如果启用，代码块语言文本将设置为斜体。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the codeblock language will always be displayed (if a language is defined), even if the `file` parameter is not specified.
ast.target: 如果启用，即使未指定 `file` 参数，代码块语言也将始终显示（如果定义了语言）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the codeblock language icon will be displayed in the header.
ast.target: 如果启用，代码块语言图标将显示在标题中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the codeblock language icon will always be displayed (if a language is defined and it has an icon), even if the `file` parameter is not specified.
ast.target: 如果启用，即使未指定 `file` 参数，代码块语言图标也将始终显示（如果定义了语言且该语言有图标）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, every comment in a code block will be styled as a `note` annotation, even without the `[!note]` syntax.
ast.target: 如果启用，代码块中的每条注释都将被样式化为 `note` 注释，即使没有 `[!note]` 语法。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to exclude annotation comments (e.g., // [!note] ...) when using the copy code button. Regular comments will always be copied.
ast.target: 启用后，使用复制代码按钮时将排除注释注释（例如 // [!note] ...）。常规注释始终会被复制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a language, to set the colors for this specific language. If you want to set colors for code blocks without a language, add "nolang" as a language.
ast.target: 添加一种语言，为此特定语言设置颜色。如果要为没有语言的代码块设置颜色，请添加 "nolang" 作为语言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select on which side the border should be displayed.
ast.target: 选择边框应显示在哪一侧。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allows you to copy inline code by clicking on it while holding a modifier key.
ast.target: 允许您按住修饰键单击内联代码来复制它。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the key to hold while clicking to copy.
ast.target: 选择单击复制时要按住的关键键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, syntax highlighting will be added to inline code (if specified).
ast.target: 如果启用，语法高亮将添加到内联代码中（如果指定）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, icons will be shown for syntax highlighted inline code.
ast.target: 如果启用，将为语法高亮的内联代码显示图标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the background color, and the text color of inline code can be styled.
ast.target: 如果启用，可以设置内联代码的背景颜色和文本颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, you can set the color for the active line inside codeblocks only.
ast.target: 如果启用，您只能为代码块内的活动行设置颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Highlights a bracket and its matching pair when you click next to one.
ast.target: 当您点击括号旁边时，高亮显示该括号及其匹配对。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you click next to a bracket, and it doesn't have a corresponding pair, or the pair does not match the opening/closing bracket (e.g: `print("hello"]` ), they will be highlighted.
ast.target: 如果您点击括号旁边，但该括号没有对应的配对，或者配对与开/闭括号不匹配（例如：`print("hello"]`），它们将被高亮显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, all occurrences of the selected text will be highlighted for easy identification.
ast.target: 如果启用，所选文本的所有出现位置将被高亮显示，以便于识别。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the default line separator `|` globally for text highlighting. You can also specify it for specific code blocks using the `lsep` parameter. The separator can only be one character long!
ast.target: 全局覆盖文本高亮的默认行分隔符 `|`。您也可以使用 `lsep` 参数为特定代码块指定分隔符。分隔符只能是一个字符！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the default text separator `:` globally for text highlighting. You can also specify it for specific code blocks using the `tsep` parameter. The separator can only be one character long!
ast.target: 全局覆盖文本高亮的默认文本分隔符 `:`。您也可以使用 `tsep` 参数为特定代码块指定分隔符。分隔符只能是一个字符！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define a name, by which you will reference the color. You can set the color itself after adding it to the list.
ast.target: 定义一个名称，您将通过该名称引用颜色。将其添加到列表后，您可以设置颜色本身。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Colors frontmatter properties using token-based syntax highlighting.
ast.target: 使用基于令牌的语法高亮为 frontmatter 属性着色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, you can use links in the header, and code blocks as well. For links to work inside code blocks, they must be part of a comment. Examples: [[Document1]], [[Document1|DisplayText]], [[Document1#Paragraph|DisplayText]], [[Document1#^<BlockId>|DisplayText]], [DisplayText](Link), http://example.com etc.
ast.target: 如果启用，您可以在标题和代码块中使用链接。要使链接在代码块内生效，它们必须是注释的一部分。示例：[[Document1]]、[[Document1|DisplayText]]、[[Document1#Paragraph|DisplayText]]、[[Document1#^<BlockId>|DisplayText]]、[DisplayText](Link)、http://example.com 等。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: To enable this setting, enable links usage option first! If enabled, code block links will be automatically updated, when a file is renamed. Please read the README for more information!
ast.target: 要启用此设置，请先启用链接使用选项！如果启用，当文件重命名时，代码块链接将自动更新。请阅读 README 以获取更多信息！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the opening and closing ``` or ~~~ lines will be hidden, when the cursor is outside the code block. They will reappear, when you click inside, allowing for easy editing.
ast.target: 如果启用，当光标位于代码块外部时，开头的 ``` 或 ~~~ 行将被隐藏。当您点击代码块内部时，它们会重新出现，以便于编辑。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the active tab for each group will be remembered based on the options below.
ast.target: 如果启用，将根据以下选项记住每个组的活动标签。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how long the active tab state is remembered.
ast.target: 选择活动标签状态被记住的时间长度。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clear all stored active tab states from disk and the current session.
ast.target: 从磁盘和当前会话中清除所有存储的活动标签状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, a "+" button will appear after the last tab to add a new block, and an "x" button will appear on each tab to remove it from the group.
ast.target: 如果启用，最后一个标签后会出现一个"+"按钮以添加新块，每个标签上会出现一个"x"按钮以将其从组中移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, all code blocks are folded by default when opening a document. To disable this behavior for a specific code block, use the "unfold" parameter.
ast.target: 如果启用，打开文档时默认折叠所有代码块。要禁用特定代码块的此行为，请使用"unfold"参数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When `Inverse fold` and `Enable semi-fold` are both enabled, this prevents short code blocks (that cannot be semi-folded) from being fully folded by default.
ast.target: 当同时启用"反向折叠"和"启用半折叠"时，这会阻止无法半折叠的短代码块默认被完全折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled folding will use semi-fold method. This means, that the first X lines will be visible only. Select the number of visisble lines. You can also enable an additional uncollapse button. Please refer to the README for more information.
ast.target: 如果启用，折叠将使用半折叠方法。这意味着仅显示前X行。选择可见行数。您还可以启用额外的展开按钮。请参阅README以获取更多信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the visual effect for semi-folded code blocks.
ast.target: 选择半折叠代码块的视觉效果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, code blocks longer than a specified number of lines will be semi-folded when a note is opened.
ast.target: 如果启用，当打开笔记时，超过指定行数的代码块将被半折叠。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Toggles the entire feature on or off. When enabled, the folded or unfolded state of code blocks will be saved based on the options below.
ast.target: 切换整个功能的开启或关闭。启用后，将根据以下选项保存代码块的折叠或展开状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which code blocks are affected. 'Respect' only saves the state for blocks where `fold` wasn't explicitly set. 'All' saves the state for all blocks.
ast.target: 选择哪些代码块受影响。“尊重”仅保存未明确设置 `fold` 的代码块状态。“全部”保存所有代码块的状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how long the folding state is remembered. 'Permanent' saves the state even after you restart Obsidian. 'Session' remembers the state only until you close the app.
ast.target: 选择折叠状态的记忆时长。“永久”即使在重启 Obsidian 后仍保存状态。“会话”仅在关闭应用前记住状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Clear all stored folded code block state from disk and the current session.
ast.target: 从磁盘和当前会话中清除所有存储的折叠代码块状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Hold this key while clicking copy, select, or delete to include the fence lines in the action.
ast.target: 按住此键同时点击复制、选择或删除，可将围栏线包含在操作中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, an additional button will be displayed on every code block. If clicked, the content of that code block is deleted. Be careful!
ast.target: 启用后，每个代码块上会显示一个额外按钮。点击后，该代码块的内容将被删除。请小心！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, an additional button will be displayed on every code block. If clicked, the content of that code block is selected (including the first and last lines of the code blocks which begin with three backticks).
ast.target: 启用后，每个代码块上会显示一个额外按钮。点击后，该代码块的内容将被选中（包括代码块以三个反引号开头和结尾的行）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, an additional button will be displayed on every code block. If clicked, the content of that code block is wrapped/unwrapped.
ast.target: 启用后，每个代码块上会显示一个额外按钮。点击后，该代码块的内容将被换行/取消换行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, an additional button will be displayed on every code block. If clicked, a snapshot is created from the code block and inserted on the clipboard.
ast.target: 启用后，每个代码块上会显示一个额外按钮。点击后，将从代码块创建快照并插入到剪贴板。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set a maximum width for the generated image. Leave blank to capture the code block at its current displayed width.
ast.target: 设置生成图像的最大宽度。留空则以代码块当前显示宽度捕获。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, all enabled buttons will always be displayed, even when you click inside the code block. Otherwise, they will only be shown when the cursor is outside the code block.
ast.target: 启用后，所有启用的按钮将始终显示，即使您点击代码块内部。否则，仅当光标位于代码块外部时才显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, in editing mode the 'Copy Code' button will always be visible on collapsed code blocks in the header. In reading mode the 'Copy Code' button will always be visible on collapsed and uncollapsed code blocks as well. Otherwise, it will only appear when hovering over the header (in editing mode) or the code block (in reading mode).
ast.target: 如果启用，在编辑模式下，“复制代码”按钮将始终显示在折叠代码块的标题上。在阅读模式下，“复制代码”按钮也将始终显示在折叠和未折叠的代码块上。否则，它只会在鼠标悬停在标题（编辑模式）或代码块（阅读模式）上时出现。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, the prompt text (e.g., "$") will be included with the command when copying.
ast.target: 如果启用，提示文本（例如“$”）将在复制时包含在命令中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a prompt to edit or preview.
ast.target: 选择一个提示进行编辑或预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Give your prompt a name and click the button to save it. You can use your prompt using this name e.g. "prompt:myPromptName".
ast.target: 为您的提示命名，然后点击按钮保存。您可以使用此名称来调用提示，例如“prompt:myPromptName”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Define the named capture groups from your regex that should be styled. For example,
if your regex includes `(?<user>...)`, you would add a "user": "user" entry here to apply
the `user` style.
ast.target: 定义正则表达式中需要设置样式的命名捕获组。例如，如果您的正则表达式包含`(?<user>...)`，您可以在此处添加一个"user": "user"条目来应用`user`样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Regex string for parsing the prompt.
ast.target: 用于解析提示的正则表达式字符串。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only enable for Windows prompts, otherwise this should remain false.
ast.target: 仅对Windows提示启用，否则应保持为false。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Only enable for prompts, when you want to set different colors for the root prompt (linux prompts only).
ast.target: 仅对提示启用，当您希望为根提示（仅限Linux提示）设置不同颜色时。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, this prompt will be used automatically for the specified languages.
ast.target: 如果启用，此提示将自动用于指定的语言。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Comma-separated list of code block languages for which the prompt should be used
(e.g., bash, python etc.).
ast.target:
应使用该提示的代码块语言的逗号分隔列表
（例如，bash、python 等）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, this prompt's regex will be used to automatically find and style prompts in code blocks of the specified languages.
ast.target: 如果启用，此提示的正则表达式将用于自动查找并样式化指定语言代码块中的提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Comma-separated list of code block languages for which this prompt's parser should be used
(e.g., bash, shell).
WARNING: This could affect performance if you have a lot of code blocks with the specified languages.
ast.target:
应使用此提示解析器的代码块语言的逗号分隔列表
（例如，bash、shell）。
警告：如果存在大量指定语言的代码块，这可能会影响性能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable to edit root-specific colors for this prompt.
ast.target: 启用后，可为此提示编辑根特定颜色。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable styling for code blocks inside Admonition blocks.
ast.target: 启用后，可为 Admonition 块内的代码块添加样式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adds a small, configurable delay before styling code blocks inside admonitions. This can resolve rendering issues in complex notes.
ast.target: 在样式化 Admonition 内的代码块之前添加一个小的可配置延迟。这可以解决复杂笔记中的渲染问题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The delay in milliseconds to wait before processing.
ast.target: 处理前等待的延迟时间（毫秒）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When disabled, this plugin completely ignores the Execute Code plugin, and does not apply any styling at all to run-* code blocks. Switch documents after changing this option, to refresh the view.
